title: Tome IX Act 3: The Orchard Wound

story.text:
# 📖 Tome IX Act 3: The Orchard Wound
**act** · shared · narrative

The wound in the orchard — value-bearing seats (V63, V51) inheriting the quantum horizon (C67). The durability of what is held depends on the path to post-quantum, not on any single primitive's wall.
> *The fruit is only as durable as the path that can re-graft the tree.*

story.title: Read the full text
story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Tomes.

## Edges out
